threads.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hi Juraj,

I hope you’re doing well!

I wanted to follow up and see if you’ve had a chance to review the draft
for our second video yet? I couldn't recall if we had officially sent it
over for your feedback.

You can find the draft here:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Yg19SIKV-osKiC895ZI0EFCaFwtlMXn8/view?usp=sharing
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1aArIOtCDDnGQ8aRNaGo18Hgc0dV2FeMr/view?usp=sharing

Looking forward to hearing your thoughts so we can get this one scheduled!

Best,

Dolunay


On Mon, Mar 30, 2026 at 4:29 PM Dolunay Özeren <ozerendolunay@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Hey Juraj,
>
> The performance is indeed low, but I don't think it is due to the
> restriction TikTok applied. We never unlocked virality on TikTok before,
> simply because the TikTok audience in Turkey doesn't really consume
> informational stuff.
>
> In fact, all information-focused creators do 10 times better on Instagram
> (sometimes even a lot more than 10 times). We always expect Instagram to
> perform the best in Turkey; TikTok is just an additional channel for us
> which doesn't hurt to post. It is good to have, but we don't expect much
> from it.
>
> On the other hand, on Instagram, we already surpassed 150k views.
>
> Best,
> Dolunay
>
> 30 Mar 2026 Pzt, saat 16:18 tarihinde Juraj Ondrejka <
> juraj.ondrejka@kickresume.com> şunu yazdı:
>
>> Thanks, the performance is very low. Do you think it could be caused by
>> not showing in certain locations (like mine in Czech republic)
>>
>> All the best,
>> Juraj, growth manager at Kickresume
>>
>>
>> On Thu, Mar 26, 2026 at 3:37 PM Dolunay Özeren <ozerendolunay@gmail.com>
>> wrote:
>>
>>> Oh 😂 sure, here is the screen recording below.

I can consider adding a dedicated video lesson for Kickresume to my course
as well. Think of like a long form video where I use your product on screen.

https://www.instagram.com/sinabaris/

Best,

Dolunay

messages.body:
Thank you for the email, Dolunay, happy to have you on board!

Could you please sign-up at www.kickresume.com and let me know the email
address you used? I will give you Premium, so you have full access to our
features.

I don't have good experience with Payoneer. How about a direct bank

messages.body:
Hi Juraj,

I had some time to work on the initial script. Since we haven't activated
the premium features yet and we're not sure exactly which feature you'd
prefer to highlight, I've left the ending a bit flexible. We can finalize
that point together later, but I'm confident the introduction is highly
engaging and effective.

Below are two examples of videos that have had tremendous organic
engagement. They typically involve dialogues between a "winner" and a
"loser" character. Before revealing the key tactic, the "winner" usually
encourages viewers to save the video, resulting in significant saves—so
it's a proven approach. I'd strongly recommend checking them out:

   -

   https://www.instagram.com/reel/DKHLswaK4Tj/
   -

   https://www.instagram.com/reel/DKtuJ3cK-Yr/

I've utilized this concept to draft the following script, specifically
tailored to address a significant and relatable issue in Turkey. Due to
heavy inflation over the past four years, wages in Turkey are very low, and
many people struggle to find decent employment or refuse to work due to
unsatisfactory pay conditions (while I work at a mobile app company
remotely in the UK). Here's the script:

A: Either I can't find a job or the ones I find are shit(censored).

B: Do you think my job is shit(censored) too?

A: Don't you earn in Euros?

B: Yes.

A: And you work from home?

B: Yes.

A: How did you find this job, man?

B: Most people create a mediocre CV and send it everywhere.

A: And?

B: When everyone does the same thing, it becomes meaningless. There's a
secret method people like me use.

A: Tell me, I'll do it too.

B: I'll explain in detail, but you'll have to promise to do it.

A: Okay, I promise I'll do it.

B: Then save this video so you don't forget.

A: Saved already!

B: Here, our character will explain the feature we want to highlight and
provide advice based on it. Possible features could be:

   1.

   Instead of writing

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hey Juraj,

Thank you for upgrading to premium! I've completed and optimized the rest
of the script, reorganizing it to highlight the most impactful and viral
parts upfront. For example, the bold question "Are you still sending your
CV everywhere like an idiot?" and "Even if you're Elon Musk, they won't
notice you," are now positioned as strong hooks at the beginning.

A couple of important notes:

   1.

   In previous videos, I've used a bug in the background to grab viewers'
   attention immediately, acting as visual hooks to boost viewer retention.
   I'd like to continue using these if you're comfortable with it.
   2.

   Towards the end of the video, I mention a score of 94. However, I
   repeatedly encountered an error message when trying to reload the CV in
   Kickresume: "detail: Request was throttled. Expected available in 83946
   seconds." To proceed smoothly, could you please send me a screenshot of a
   CV with ATS score above 90? That would be perfect for the video.

Here's the revised script:

A: Either I can't find a job, or the ones I find suck.

B: Are you still sending your CV everywhere like an idiot?

A: Yes??

B: Bro, no company actually reads your CV. Even if you're Elon Musk, they
won't notice you.

A: Wait, what?

B: They use something called ATS, an automatic resume scanning system.

A: So?

B: Look at this (takes phone, shows screen). I’m uploading my CV to an AI
called Kickresume.

B: It checks if my CV can pass the ATS system… (loading continues) Did you
saved this video, by the way?

A: Saving it right now.

B: Look, I got a 32.

A: So even if I'm a perfect candidate, ATS will reject me?

B: Exactly, that's why I’m now using Kickresume’s AI to remake my CV.

A: Upload the new version, let's see.

B: See? 94!

[TikTok/Shorts ends here, Instagram version continues]

A: Can you send me the link?

B: Comment "CV" below, and I'll send it to you.


Looking forward to your feed

messages.body:
Hey Dolunay, thank you for the update.

The error message shows up because we have a limit of max 5 uploads per day
for the feature. After 24 hours you should be able to access the resume
checker again and make the screenshot. Please let me know if it works.

I like the first idea for the hook in the beginning. If your previous
videos proved that hooks like this work, let's definitely use it! I also
like the script.

Looking forward to seeing the draft.

All the best,
Juraj, growth manager at Kickresume

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Thank you for the link, Dolunay. If you want us to send the payment in
Turkish currency, we need an invoice with the $800 converted to Turkish
Lira. The sum has to be in Turkish Lira on the invoice. The bank will
likely charge you directly with the fee. I would suggest creating a PayPal
account where fees are fairly low. Or the Revolut bank account if available
in Turkey.

These 2 payment methods (PayPal and Revolut) work best from my experience.

Please let me know what your decision is.

All the best,
Juraj, growth manager at Kickresume

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hi Juraj,

We've hit 10K views even though it's just posted today, early results are
promising!

Unfortunately, both PayPal and Revolut are not available in Turkey, and
most brands I work with use Payoneer for payments. I know you didn’t have
the best experience with Payoneer in the past, but they have added new
features.

There are two easy options I can offer:

   1.

   I can generate a *payment link* (screenshot attached) that allows you to
   pay via any method you prefer — including PayPal, bank transfer, and more —
   without you needing a Payoneer account.

[image: Screenshot 2025-08-08 at 17.20.48.png]
Alternatively, I can create a *European Receiving Account* via Payoneer if
you’d like to transfer directly.

Please let me know which option works better for you.

Best regards,
Dolunay

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hey Juraj,

Thank you for sending it over. I am wondering if that's something anyone
can try for free so I can mention it on the video. For now, I've prepared a
script without mentioning it. But, I can change it.

Since the skit worked, I made another skit. Here is the translated version:

https://www.notion.so/Shared-With-Juraj-24f26924bb82808581e3dbe5adf51e38?source=copy_link

Also, I would like to inform you about one method that we've been using
with other international brands I've worked with. If we make a winning
video (just like the previous one), I usually make the exact same video in
English and send it to the brand, giving full rights. So, they can post it
and run ads with it. Here are some examples:
- Nim AI
<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1TQPikOb-jx2ahCLuNLtehrpvQWDj1e5N/view?usp=sharing>
- eSIMio
<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1th9zBZSbYhnE0FGyhoByVzfGrFzWD0qW/view?usp=sharing>

Let me know if you're interested in.

Best,

Dolunay

Thank you for the script, I really like it!

Yes, anyone can try it for free once - feel free to mention it in the video.

Thank you for the offer for the translated video to English - it's very
nice of you! The thing is we don't really run a lot of ads on social media,
so we don't really have a use for the video. But I really appreciate it!

Have a great weekend, I'll be looking forward to the video draft!

All the best,
Juraj, growth manager at Kickresume

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hey Juraj,

Thanks for remembering the initial price and offering it proactively 🙏

Yes, let’s do two videos. I can aim to publish both this month if that
timing works for you.

I’ll work on the scripts and send them to you.

I’d also like your thoughts on a YouTube long-form collaboration. Many
people ask how to use the tool and mention that the interface can be a bit
hard to understand. A tutorial-style video could help. Here’s my channel:
https://www.youtube.com/@dolunayozeren

For distribution, I usually seed initial views via my Instagram automation:
I offer a free, high-value tutorial and ask followers to comment a keyword
to get the link. When they comment, they receive the link and go straight
to YouTube, which drives the first views; after that, YouTube picks it up
once the algorithm sees good performance.

If we do the tutorial, we can include both the YouTube tutorial link and
the Kickresume link in the DM automation—so people who want more detail go
to YouTube video, and those ready to use it go straight to Kickresume.

Best,

Dolunay

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hey Juraj,

I'm on KickResume, trying to figure out how the video structure should go.

For YouTube, I would like to cover the entire job searching process
step-by-step. Here are the features that I have in mind to cover. Each step
covers one AI feature of KickResume.
1. LinkedIn import to generate your first resume.
1a. Using Carrier Map before heading to job search, if you are unsure what
job is best for you.
2. Resume tailoring to generate a job-specific resume.
3. Finding who is posting the job on LinkedIn, and then preparing a cover
letter with AI.
4. 'Interview Questions' To get ready for the interview.

I'm going to actually use all the features highlighted above. Such as, use
my own LinkedIn to create a resume and then find an actual job. Then tailor
my resume according to that and then create a cover letter. Then prepare
interview questions.

- I'm unable to show the KickResume job search function since there is no
Turkey in country filters.

This is the outline I had in mind. If you have specific features that you
think are worth highlighting, let me know. I think the name of the video
will be "How to Land Any Job with AI."

Regarding short-form collaborations, here are the features I had in mind:
1. Cover letter builder: as I did before, I can make a skit video where one
loser is complaining about not getting any job interviews, while the other
guy, winner, explains that the real reason is to reach out to the manager
using a special cover letter.
2. LinkedIn Import + Resume tailoring: this will be a skit video as well. A
guy who is an HR on a phone call making a joke to his friends, saying,
"Today, I rejected 100 CVs and they don't even know." The other guy asks
why, and HR explains that they don't read CVs, they just use a software
that checks all the CVs. And then explains how to pass this software's
filtering.

Looking forward to hearing your thoughts. Sorry for a very long email 😂

Best,
Dolunay

On Fri, Oct

messages.body:
Hey Juraj,

After a busy weekend I have finally finished the video draft and also
finished scripts for short form content so we can support the long form
video.

Here is the video draft link:
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1y9NjcCNoerj6_-iZAKTVRmOJ4ivY1b-N/view?usp=sharing
(I'll work on tiny little things such as effects, visuals, etc. to make
more engaging, it's 97% done 😀 )

Here is a script for the first short/reels/tiktok video:

A: I’ve applied to at least 100 jobs. I wasn’t even invited to an interview.
B: So you’re good at your job, but terrible at job hunting.
A: Yeah?
B: Look, I worked remotely for a UK company while living in Turkey and got
paid in euros. Watch till the end.
A: I’m saving this video.
B: You need a role-specific CV, and you must send a cover letter with each
application.
A: Who’s got time for that, man?
B: AI has the time.
A: ChatGPT?
B: No, man. There’s an AI built specifically for job seekers.
I go to Kickresume, it does everything for me.
A: I need you to teach me.

INSTAGRAM ONLY — B: I made a free video. I explain everything in 20
minutes. Type *SEND* in the comments and I’ll DM you the link.
TIKTOK ONLY — B: I made a free video. I explain everything in 20 minutes.
Link in my bio.
SHORTS ONLY — B: I made a free video. I explain everything in 20 minutes.
Tap the button below to watch.


Here is a script for the second short/reels/tiktok video:

A: I think I can’t find a job because I write my CV like sh*t.
B: I had AI write mine, and then I landed a euro-paying job.
A: ChatGPT writes worse than I do.
B: Nah. There’s an AI that scans my LinkedIn profile and writes based on
that.
A: My LinkedIn profile is bad.
B: Dubai chocolate tastes bad too, but the packaging is great. Kickresume’s
AI “packages” you so well that your CV looks amazing.
A: What else?
B: To boost your chances, it even writes a cover letter in your voice.
A: Got a link?

INSTAGRAM — B: I’ve got the link and a free video wh

messages.body:
Hi Juraj,

Wow, I love it! No brand has ever done this before. They sometimes offer
some stuff, but it was never seven days all free without a credit card.
That is actually a great selling point; we can take advantage of it to go
even more viral.

I accept your offer. We will do 2x IG reels + stories, and the ManyChat
automation as we always do, for $1100.

Also, I want to connect you with my Partnerships Manager, Ceren. We will
work on the content together and provide you with the draft.

Best,
Dolunay

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hi Juraj,

The script is ready. I'm sharing it below. I hope you like it, looking
forward your feedback.

Best,
Ceren.

*KICKRESUME x DOLUNAY *

*At the beginning of the video, we see a conversation between two different
“Dolunay” characters.*

*Character 1:* Bro, can you lend me 10,000 TL again this month?
*Character 2:* Haven’t you found a job yet?
*C1:* I apply to like 50 places, but no one even looks. *(shows their phone
screen)*
*C2:* *(looking at the screen)* Well, of course they won’t if you prepare a
CV like this.

*(Screen recording starts)*
You go to Kickresume.

You choose Create a CV with AI.

You type your name and what you do.

*C1:* *(takes notes)*

It creates everything in the best way possible including the intro paragrap
*h* and all the details.

It also offers you different design templates.

And the best part is: you can update your CV in any language you want, so
you can apply to jobs abroad too.

*C1:* Wow, that’s amazing — what was it called?

*INSTAGRAM CLOSING:*
*C2:* Just text me “CV” and I’ll send it to you right away.

*TIKTOK/SHORTS CLOSING:*
*C2:* Save Kickresume — you’ll need it later.

>

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hi Jurah,

I hope everything is going well. The draft for our first piece of content
is ready; I’m sharing it in the attachment.

The script for our second piece of content is also ready. I’m sharing that
with you below as well. I hope you like it.

We look forward to receiving your feedback on both pieces of content.

Best,
Ceren.

 KickResume-Dolunay-24.02.2026-Instagram.mp4
<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1MEONfiI1ObqmrEe1cKPDknRzUOAXxqEX/view?usp=drive_web>
 KickResume-Dolunay-24.02.2026-tiktok.mp4
<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lfDySDG57EUT9Zq9VzKN1psJe-NgeZ7g/view?usp=drive_web>


*KICKRESUME x DOLUNAY 2*

*(We have structured this as a continuation of the previous content.)*

*Character 1: *They got back to me about my job application! They called me
for an interview tomorrow. (excited)
* Character 2: *Well, are you ready?
* C1*: Not at all! (panicked)
* C2:* Kickresume doesn’t just help you create a professional CV; it also
prepares you for the interview.
* C1:* Wait, how?
* C2:* Open the app right now and go to the interview practice section.
* C1:* And then?
* C2:* You type in the job title you applied for and paste the job
description below. It generates the questions you might be asked and the
answers you should give.
* C1:* That’s amazing! Can it go to the interview for me too, bro?
* C2:* Not that much! Kickresume already did all the work; you can handle
this part yourself.
* C1:* So, where’s the link?

*INSTAGRAM CLOSING:* Comment “apply” and I’ll send it to you.
* TIKTOK/SHORT:* Link is in the description/bio, save this, you’ll need it.

>

messages.subject: Re: Sorry Juraj 🥺 I got 19M views, but it’s not Kickresume 😥
messages.body:
Hey Juraj,

The performance is indeed low, but I don't think it is due to the
restriction TikTok applied. We never unlocked virality on TikTok before,
simply because the TikTok audience in Turkey doesn't really consume
informational stuff.

In fact, all information-focused creators do 10 times better on Instagram
(sometimes even a lot more than 10 times). We always expect Instagram to
perform the best in Turkey; TikTok is just an additional channel for us
which doesn't hurt to post. It is good to have, but we don't expect much
from it.

On the other hand, on Instagram, we already surpassed 150k views.

Best,
Dolunay

--- [Mon, 30 Mar 2026 16:29:13 +0300] From: "Dolunay Özeren" <ozerendolunay@gmail.com> ---
Hey Juraj,

The performance is indeed low, but I don't think it is due to the
restriction TikTok applied. We never unlocked virality on TikTok before,
simply because the TikTok audience in Turkey doesn't really consume
informational stuff.

In fact, all information-focused creators do 10 times better on Instagram
(sometimes even a lot more than 10 times). We always expect Instagram to
perform the best in Turkey; TikTok is just an additional channel for us
which doesn't hurt to post. It is good to have, but we don't expect much
from it.

On the other hand, on Instagram, we already surpassed 150k views.

Best,
Dolunay
